articles.title: Trillions Of SHIB On The Move By Mysterious Whales as Shiba Inu Ecosystem Looks ‘Ripe to Explode’
articles.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB), known for its dog-themed branding, has recently experienced a remarkable surge in whale activity, indicating significant movements of large SHIB tokens.

articles.title: Cardano Whale Signal Historically Correlated With Price Reversals Flashes Green: Santiment
articles.description: A Cardano (ADA) whale metric recently indicated the Ethereum (ETH) competitor could be primed for a price reversal, according to the crypto analytics firm Santiment. On Monday, Cardano whale transactions exceeding $100,000 in value surged to their highest number since November 8th. Explains Santiment, “These spikes in whale activity historically correlate with potential price reversals....

articles.title: Bitcoin Sinks Below $58K, Crypto Market Drops 9% in Run-Up to Fed Decision
articles.description: BTC is down nearly 9% in the last 24 hours having dropped below the $60,000 support level late on Tuesday.

articles.title: Bitcoin Investor Roger Ver Arrested in Spain for $50 Million Tax Fraud
articles.description: Early Bitcoin investor Roger Ver has been arrested and hit with tax evasion charges, the U.S. Department of Justice announced Tuesday.
